help_intro: Welcome to the Projekt City Helpcenter. Here you will find answers to common questions, guides for getting started, and information about our tools and policies. If you cannot find what you are looking for, you can always reach out to us directly.
help_desc_faq: - Answers to common questions about costs, platforms, updates, and bug reports.
help_desc_import: - Step-by-step instructions for loading Projekt City in single player or on a multiplayer server.
help_desc_debug: - Learn about the browser console, the security warning, and how to stay safe.
